nav_descriptions.dashboard: Overview of your net worth and cash flow.
nav_descriptions.accounts: Manage your bank accounts, cards, and limits.
nav_descriptions.transactions: Register and track your income and expenses.
nav_descriptions.budget: Distribute your income and plan your monthly spending.
nav_descriptions.debts: Control who owes you money and what you owe to others.
nav_descriptions.goals: Create medium and long-term financial objectives.
nav_descriptions.insights: Smart reports on your spending habits.
nav_descriptions.settings: Account settings, profile, and income distribution templates.

settings.hide_balances_desc: Hides balances and amounts for privacy

dashboard.net_worth_desc: The sum of everything you own (positive balance) minus what you owe.
dashboard.income_desc: All the money that entered your accounts during the current month.
dashboard.expense_desc: All the money that went out of your accounts during the current month.
dashboard.balance_desc: The amount of money left over after subtracting your expenses from your income.
dashboard.flow_evolution_desc: Comparative chart showing how income and expenses behaved day by day this month.
dashboard.top_categories_desc: The categories where you spent most of your money this month.
dashboard.pending_transactions_desc: Future entries that have not yet been marked as cleared in the account.

debts.title: Debts
debts.desc: A simple management of receivables (people who owe you) and payables (your own debts).
debts.me_devem_desc: Money you lent or receivables. When paid, they turn into Income.
debts.minhas_dividas_desc: Money you borrowed. When paid, they turn into Expense.
